summary: Iteration 8 - Comprehensive E2E Testing Complete. All critical fixes verified: (1) /api/leads no longer returns 307 redirect, (2) /api/platform/auth/login returns valid JSON, (3) Cache Clear button visible and /api/admin/cache/clear endpoint works. 13/13 backend tests passed. UI navigation working across all major pages.

issues: Cache Clear & Refresh button in top-right appears slightly faded/low contrast in some views

notes.note: React warning about non-boolean attribute - minor, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: 307 redirect fix verified - leads_router.py route changed from @router.get('/') to @router.get('')
Admin cache endpoint properly validates X-Admin-Key header
All sidebar navigation items are clickable and load correct content
Circuit Breakers page shows all 13 external services with proper status
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical fixes from previous iteration verified. Backend APIs working: /api/health, /api/platform/auth/login, /api/leads, /api/leads/stats, /api/admin/cache/clear. Frontend pages tested: Homepage, Login, Dashboard, Leads Dashboard, Admin Mission Control, Settings, Circuit Breakers. Sidebar navigation fully functional. Mocked APIs: Stripe, Coinbase, some AI chat (OpenRouter key missing).

issue_2.verification: Returns valid JSON with token, email, tier, role fields

new_feature.description: Cache Clear & Refresh button in Admin Mission Control
new_feature.verification: Button visible, POST /api/admin/cache/clear returns 200 with X-Admin-Key header

pages_tested.notes: Login flow works, redirects to dashboard
Shows AI Conversation, metrics, agent status

mocked_apis.openrouter_ai: MOCKED - key missing but not critical for auth/leads testing
